prompts.text: Have an API designer and client engineer directly challenge each other's contract assumptions and converge on one recommendation.
After the initial security remediation is complete, use a fresh adversarial surface to find residual gaps, fix accepted issues, and re-review.
Have several agents build a single durable decision record over time, showing proposals, challenges, and resolutions without concurrent edits to the canonical file.
Run a multi-agent investigation where all accepted findings must accumulate in one governed plan that later agents can inspect and extend.
The mobile crash appears after two unrelated releases; prevent anchoring by giving owners competing causes and tests that cannot support every theory at once.
Explain what this regular expression matches in one paragraph without delegating the task.
Have a fresh reviewer inspect the completed rollout plan, apply accepted fixes, and review the changed result again.
Coordinate several agents through one canonical planning artifact with a single writer and visible provenance.
Accumulate several agents' findings in one canonical evidence board with visible provenance and a single controlled writer.
The regression has multiple credible causes; assign rival hypotheses and run tests that falsify or distinguish them.
Implement three non-overlapping workflow slices in parallel, merge them in a declared order, test the seams, and obtain an independent integrated-state review.
Advance a policy draft through author, legal reviewer, and publisher only when each downstream owner accepts the incoming artifact against declared evidence.
Commission four independent incident assessments, conceal identities and conclusions until submission, then let one lead adjudicate against a frozen evidence rubric.
Two recovery attempts did not move the database corruption issue; have hypothesis owners state what would falsify them and challenge competing explanations with fresh evidence.
Have a database expert and API designer directly challenge each other's consistency model and reconcile one joint recommendation.
Advance a contract from author to implementer to verifier through receiver-owned acceptance gates.
Move a schema change from designer to implementer to verifier, but let each receiver inspect raw artifacts and own an explicit acceptance gate before work advances.
An intermittent failure has rival causes; assign hypothesis owners, state falsifiers, and run discriminating tests.
Ask a product strategist and accessibility specialist to exchange critiques of this onboarding flow and negotiate an evidence-backed compromise.
Pass a completed data contract from its author to a downstream consumer who must inspect raw proof and explicitly accept or reject it.
Keep independent design proposals blind until submission, then adjudicate them with a fixed rubric.
A first-pass implementation is complete; bring in a fresh reviewer to research comparable patterns, find gaps, apply accepted fixes, and review the revised state again.
Build this feature through three independent end-to-end slices with exclusive file ownership, then integrate and validate the complete behavior.
Build a single program plan from parallel workstream updates while preventing concurrent-edit damage and retaining every accepted change's owner.
Summarize the public methods of this one Python class in five bullets; do not delegate or create shared project state.
Split this audit across browser traces, server logs, code, and documentation as independent proof surfaces, then synthesize.
Compare a specification with implementation, contract tests, public docs, and real API behavior using independent evidence tracks.
Move the schema from designer to implementer to consumer, requiring each receiver to inspect proof and accept the handoff.
Implement onboarding, account recovery, and session management as separate vertical slices, then integrate them under one contract.
Convert this single timestamp to UTC and explain the result without using additional agents.
Obtain two blind security judgments, reveal only controlled evidence for one challenge round, and record a traceable final adjudication.
Run a research-to-spec-to-build pipeline where every stage can reject the incoming package with evidence and the sender cannot self-certify acceptance.
Collect three independent architecture proposals without letting authors see one another, then rank them against criteria fixed in advance.
Build checkout, refund, and receipt flows as independent vertical slices, then integrate them under one product contract.
The failure has three plausible causes; assign competing hypotheses, state falsifiers, and run tests that make the explanations predict different results.
Correct the spelling in this one heading and show the diff; no completed work needs a fresh review loop.
A data mismatch survives two attempted fixes; compare upstream, transformation, and caching hypotheses through explicit predictions and fresh first-failure artifacts.
Let a database architect and SRE question each other's failover assumptions, answer concrete challenges, and return one joint position with unresolved dissent.
Let a legal reviewer and developer-experience lead directly debate this API policy and preserve any evidence-backed unresolved disagreement.
Update this one constant and run the focused test; the work is too small to divide into vertical slices.
Let a database specialist and reliability engineer directly challenge their capacity plans and reconcile one position.
Have two specialists directly challenge each other's architecture positions for three exchanges and converge on a joint recommendation.
An outage has three plausible causes; assign rival hypotheses, require falsifiers, and run tests that distinguish their predictions.
The crash has competing causes; require rival predictions, falsifiers, and discriminating experiments.
Move a dataset from collector to cleaner to analyst, with each receiver inspecting the raw package and explicitly accepting or rejecting it before continuing.
Evolve one canonical domain glossary through specialist proposals and challenges so later agents inherit the resolved terms and unresolved conflicts.
Audit this release in parallel across source code, tests, documentation, package contents, and hosted CI, then return one coverage matrix and conclusion.
Assign distinct owners to search, sharing, and offline access end to end, keep hot files exclusive, and integrate only after slice-level evidence.
The migration plan is complete; perform a fresh critical pass, make evidence-backed corrections, and explicitly assess the revised plan's remaining risk.
The architecture proposal already has a first pass; commission an independent challenge, revise supported weaknesses, and have the reviewer inspect the new version.
Split the release by three complete operator journeys, prove each narrowly, merge in a fixed order, and review the integrated state independently.
Stress-test this finished product plan with an independent adversarial second round, revise it from supported findings, and state the remaining risk after re-review.
A prototype has already been implemented; ask a new reviewer to test assumptions, accept or reject findings, improve it, and run another review round.
Have several agents accumulate findings in one canonical research record with a single writer and visible provenance.
Verify a release across the built wheel, source archive, clean install, dependency graph, and hosted workflow as separate proof owners.
Review the completed repository from a new surface, prioritize actionable defects, fix them, and repeat review until remaining concerns are explicit.
Keep three first-pass proposals mutually blind, then let a lead rank them against criteria frozen in advance.
Collect independent remediation proposals blindly, then adjudicate them against criteria frozen before disclosure.
Build authentication, profile editing, and notification preferences as independent end-to-end user slices with exclusive ownership, then integrate and run broad validation.
Keep model-vendor evaluations compartmentalized until each first pass is frozen, then rank the submissions with a neutral rubric.
Coordinate several agents through one shared evidence ledger with a single canonical writer and durable provenance.
Transfer a release candidate through security, operations, and release owners sequentially, recording each receiver's acceptance criteria and decision.
Review this security boundary through authentication code, authorization tests, deployment policy, and runtime traces without entering a fix loop.
Inspect a performance regression simultaneously on device traces, server metrics, network captures, and recent code changes, then reconcile the findings.
Have an operations lead and data scientist negotiate alert thresholds through direct questions, revisions, and a joint final recommendation.
Ask a security researcher and browser engineer to directly cross-examine this sandbox proposal and produce one revised threat position.
Gather competing product forecasts without cross-talk, disclose only normalized evidence for one controlled challenge, and record the final ranking.
Have several researchers contribute to one durable literature map that records evidence lineage, contradictions, and the lead's canonical synthesis.
Collect independent design proposals without cross-contamination and let a lead rank them against a preregistered rubric.
Coordinate four reviewers through one shared evidence board; preserve each contribution's provenance and conflicts, with one canonical writer producing the final board.
Research the behavior using official documentation, implementation source, runtime reproduction, and version history as separate evidence surfaces.
Add a docstring to this deterministic helper and run its existing unit test; there is no unresolved failure to diagnose.
Perform a read-only audit across code, tests, docs, packaging, and hosted automation as separate proof surfaces, then synthesize the findings.
Research the library behavior from official docs, source code, and a minimal reproduction in parallel, then synthesize the evidence.
Maintain a shared incident evidence ledger across multiple agent shifts, with one writer applying accepted updates and preserving the decision trail.
Split this product increment by independently useful vertical behaviors rather than layers, give each slice narrow proof, and converge through one integration owner.
The deployment fails intermittently and logs support three causes; assign rival hypotheses, require different predictions, and run the cheapest discriminating tests.
Ask two legal reviewers for uninfluenced first opinions, keep their work compartmentalized, then resolve the choice against criteria declared in advance.
Move one dependent artifact sequentially from researcher to designer to implementer, with each receiver owning an acceptance gate.
Format this JSON object with sorted keys; the result can be checked directly without parallel investigation.
Ask a fresh reviewer to challenge the completed release, apply accepted fixes, and review the revised state.
Latency regressed after several simultaneous changes and the team is anchored on caching; force competing causal accounts and finish with one surviving cause or bounded unknown.
Transfer a migration plan through database, service, and operations owners, preserving every rejection reason and revised resubmission.
Inspect code, tests, documentation, and packaging through independent parallel proof surfaces, then reconcile all findings.
Build ingestion, correction, and export workflows as independently useful vertical behaviors, then combine them and validate the shared contract.
Have several agents maintain one canonical incident ledger with visible provenance, conflicts, and a single writer.
Rename this local variable for clarity and run its focused unit test; no staged delegation is required.
Build import, validation, and export as independent end-to-end slices, then integrate and verify the seams.
Run model training, evaluation, safety review, and deployment as dependent stages where no sender may self-certify the next gate.
Run a blind benchmark of three agent designs, freeze every first pass before disclosure, and let an adjudicator select with a traceable scorecard.
Split a release audit across code, tests, docs, packaging, and CI as independent proof surfaces, then synthesize one conclusion.
Maintain one canonical multi-agent decision record with provenance, controlled writing, and visible unresolved conflicts.
Divide this incident investigation across logs, code, infrastructure, and runbooks in parallel, then synthesize the independent proof surfaces.
A cache regression has several plausible causes; assign competing hypotheses and run discriminating tests that could falsify each one.
Let a finance controller and platform lead challenge each other's cloud-cost plan for three bounded rounds and reconcile the remaining tradeoff.
Have a product manager and backend engineer exchange critiques directly, revise their positions, and return a joint rollout recommendation.
A finished pull request needs a fresh adversarial reviewer to find gaps, recommend fixes, and re-review the accepted changes.
Move a contract from designer to implementer to verifier, and require each receiver to inspect raw proof before accepting the handoff.
Implement this larger feature through independently owned vertical slices and integrate them under one shared contract.
Have two domain experts directly challenge and revise each other's design positions before returning one joint view.
Keep three architecture proposals blind until first passes are frozen, then adjudicate them against criteria fixed in advance.
Move a release artifact sequentially from builder to security reviewer to operator through receiver-owned acceptance gates.
Take the finished documentation rewrite through an independent comparable-pattern review, apply justified changes, and inspect the final document again.
Ask three engineers for independent migration proposals, prevent cross-contamination, then have a lead score them against criteria declared before disclosure.
Have a compiler engineer and language designer debate the type-system change directly, update their arguments, and converge where evidence permits.
Deliver catalog browsing, cart editing, and checkout as separate user-visible slices with narrow proofs and one integration owner.
Bring a fresh reviewer to the completed implementation, apply accepted fixes, and review the revised state again.
Keep three vendor assessments blind until first passes are frozen, then adjudicate them with a predeclared scorecard.
Assess mobile startup time across cold-device traces, bundle composition, network waterfalls, and backend latency, then synthesize one conclusion.
Investigate a data incident in parallel through warehouse queries, pipeline code, scheduler history, and lineage metadata, then produce one coverage matrix.
A flaky payment test has four credible causes; make each owner predict different evidence, challenge the alternatives, and eliminate theories with targeted experiments.
Create one canonical compliance dossier from several specialist contributions, keeping source provenance, rejected claims, and conflict resolutions visible.
Bring a fresh adversarial reviewer to a finished implementation, apply supported fixes, and review the revised state again.
Build account setup, billing, and cancellation as independently owned vertical slices, then integrate and test the seams.
Split an initial audit across code, tests, docs, packaging, and CI in parallel, then synthesize one evidence-backed conclusion.
Throughput collapsed but metrics disagree about CPU, locks, and network saturation; run a bounded evidence duel rather than diagnosing by vote.
Memory usage doubled with conflicting profiler evidence; assign rival causal models, require self-falsification, and choose the next test by information gain.
Bring in a fresh reviewer after the first pass, fix accepted gaps, and review the revised artifact again.
Accumulate several agents' accepted findings in one durable canonical artifact with provenance and a single writer.
A timeout has three plausible causes; assign competing hypothesis owners and run tests that distinguish their predictions.
Build search, saved filters, and export as independently owned end-to-end slices, then integrate and test their seams.
Give the finished rollout plan to a fresh critical reviewer, apply accepted fixes, and re-review the changed plan.
Let a security engineer and platform architect directly question each other's deployment plan and converge on one evidence-backed position.
Implement signup, consent management, and account deletion in parallel vertical slices, then batch broad validation after convergence.
Have a privacy counsel and ML engineer directly challenge this retention design for three exchanges, revise their views, and reconcile one recommendation.
Collect independent risk estimates from specialists who cannot communicate, then have a lead compare them fairly without retrofitting the decision criteria.
Hand a generated API client from producer to mobile consumer to integration verifier through receiver-owned proof gates.
Transfer an implementation from builder to verifier, requiring the verifier to inspect raw artifacts and explicitly accept or reject it.
